title: phyllanthus dumbeaensis
intro: Phyllanthus dumbeaensis, also known as the New Caledonian phyllanthus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating liver and gallbladder issues due to its hepatoprotective and choleretic properties. The plant has been shown to have various health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral activities, which may help protect against cell damage, reduce inflammation, and fight against certain viral infections. Phyllanthus dumbeaensis is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
